caption: A woman with curly blonde hair tied up, wearing black headphones and a black t-shirt, sits in a recording studio. She is positioned in front of a professional microphone, looking slightly to her right with a neutral expression. In the background, a blue screen displays the word "Johnson" in red text, and the words "Employee Only" are visible in small white text above. To her right is a yellow vertical pillar. The "BOSS TALK 101" logo is overlaid on the right side of the scene, and a "PODCAST" logo is visible on the left. Across the sequence, the woman remains relatively still, maintaining her posture and gaze, while the lighting and her subtle facial expressions shift slightly as she listens or prepares to speak. The environment and equipment remain constant throughout the clip.
